description: AI Agent 领域最新情报

research.title: AgentRx: A Benchmark Study of LLM Agents for Multimodal Clinical Prediction Tasks
research.summary: 【arXiv】Building effective clinical decision support systems requires the synthesis of complex heterogeneous multimodal data. Such modalities include temporal electronic health records data, medical images, radiology reports, and clinical notes. Large langua
research.title_zh: AgentRx ：多模式临床预测任务的LLM药剂基准研究
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】建立有效的临床决策支持系统需要综合复杂的异构多模态数据。这些模式包括时间电子健康记录数据、医学图像、放射学报告和临床记录。
research.title_en: AgentRx: A Benchmark Study of LLM Agents for Multimodal Clinical Prediction Tasks
research.summary_en: 【arXiv】Building effective clinical decision support systems requires the synthesis of complex heterogeneous multimodal data. Such modalities include temporal electronic health records data, medical images, radiology reports, and clinical notes. Large langua

research.title: MemReread: Enhancing Agentic Long-Context Reasoning via Memory-Guided Rereading
research.summary: 【arXiv】To tackle long-context reasoning tasks without the quadratic complexity of standard attention mechanisms, approaches based on agent memory have emerged, which typically maintain a dynamically updated memory when linearly processing document chunks. T
research.title_zh: MemReread ：通过记忆导向重读增强Agentic长上下文推理
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】为了在没有标准注意力机制的二次复杂性的情况下处理长上下文推理任务，已经出现了基于代理内存的方法，这些方法通常在线性处理文档块时保持动态更新的内存。
research.title_en: MemReread: Enhancing Agentic Long-Context Reasoning via Memory-Guided Rereading
research.summary_en: 【arXiv】To tackle long-context reasoning tasks without the quadratic complexity of standard attention mechanisms, approaches based on agent memory have emerged, which typically maintain a dynamically updated memory when linearly processing document chunks. T

research.title: IndustryBench: Probing the Industrial Knowledge Boundaries of LLMs
research.summary: 【arXiv】In industrial procurement, an LLM answer is useful only if it survives a standards check: recommended material must match operating condition, every parameter must respect a regulated threshold, and no procedure may contradict a safety clause. Partia
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】在工业采购中， LLM答案只有在通过标准检查后才有用：推荐的材料必须与操作条件相匹配，每个参数都必须遵守规定的阈值，并且任何程序都不得与安全条款相矛盾。Partia
research.title_en: IndustryBench: Probing the Industrial Knowledge Boundaries of LLMs
research.summary_en: 【arXiv】In industrial procurement, an LLM answer is useful only if it survives a standards check: recommended material must match operating condition, every parameter must respect a regulated threshold, and no procedure may contradict a safety clause. Partia

research.title: Towards Autonomous Railway Operations: A Semi-Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach to the Vehicle Rescheduling Problem
research.summary: 【arXiv】Managing disruptions in railway traffic management is a major challenge. Rising traffic density and infrastructure limits increase complexity, making the Vehicle Routing and Scheduling Problem (VRSP) difficult to solve reliably and in real time. Whil
research.title_zh: 走向自主铁路运营：车辆调度问题的半层次深度强化学习方法
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】管理铁路交通管理的中断是一项重大挑战。不断上升的交通密度和基础设施限制增加了复杂性，使得车辆路由和调度问题（ VRSP ）难以可靠和实时地解决。
research.title_en: Towards Autonomous Railway Operations: A Semi-Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach to the Vehicle Rescheduling Problem
research.summary_en: 【arXiv】Managing disruptions in railway traffic management is a major challenge. Rising traffic density and infrastructure limits increase complexity, making the Vehicle Routing and Scheduling Problem (VRSP) difficult to solve reliably and in real time. Whil

github.title: SipMyBeers/ultra-beers
github.summary: 【GitHub】Open-source local plan refinement. Like /ultraplan but on your own machine, dispatched to local Claude Code agents. （⭐ 1）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】开源本地计划优化。喜欢/超计划，但在您自己的机器上，派遣到当地的Claude Code代理。（⭐ 1 ）

github.title: avectats7/clever-comebacks
github.summary: 【GitHub】Paste a mean message, pick a tier (soft/medium/heavy/trainwreck), get one clever sentence back. A free, open-source Claude Code skill. （⭐ 1）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】粘贴一条卑鄙的信息，选择一个等级（软/中/重/火车残骸） ，找回一个聪明的句子。免费开源的Claude Code技能。（⭐ 1 ）
github.summary_en: 【GitHub】Paste a mean message, pick a tier (soft/medium/heavy/trainwreck), get one clever sentence back. A free, open-source Claude Code skill. （⭐ 1）

github.title: HarshitSingh-PM/claude-config-manager
github.summary: 【GitHub】Local, open-source UI for editing every Claude Code config file from one place — settings, CLAUDE.md, MCP servers, subagents, commands, credentials. Run with: npx claude-config-manager （⭐ 0）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】本地开源UI ，用于从一个地方编辑每个Claude Code配置文件—设置、CLAUDE.md、MCP服务器、子代理、命令、凭据。运行方式： npx claude-config-manager （⭐ 0 ）
github.summary_en: 【GitHub】Local, open-source UI for editing every Claude Code config file from one place — settings, CLAUDE.md, MCP servers, subagents, commands, credentials. Run with: npx claude-config-manager （⭐ 0）

models.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
models.summary: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.
models.title_zh: 驾驶人工智能拉力赛， Robinhood准备第二次零售企业IPO
models.summary_zh: Robinhood为其第二个风险基金保密备案，这次是针对成长和早期创业公司。
models.title_en: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
models.summary_en: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

models.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
models.summary: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.
models.title_zh: 通用汽车刚刚解雇了数百名IT员工，聘请那些拥有更强人工智能技能的人
models.summary_zh: 一些职位侧重于人工智能原生开发、数据工程和分析、基于云的工程、代理和模型开发以及提示工程和新的人工智能工作流程。
models.title_en: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
models.summary_en: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

models.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
models.summary: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."
models.title_zh: Digg再次尝试，这次是作为AI新闻聚合器
models.summary_zh: 在给测试人员的电子邮件中，该公司表示，该网站的目标是“跟踪空间中最具影响力的声音” ，并展示实际上值得“关注”的新闻。
models.title_en: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
models.summary_en: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

models.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
models.summary: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.
models.title_zh: 太空数据中心没有足够的火箭— Cowboy Space筹集了2.75亿美元建造它们
models.summary_zh: 显然，对人工智能计算的贪得无厌的需求让数据中心企业家把目光投向了明星。有一个关键问题：没有足够的火箭将数据中心放在地球周围的轨道上，而且它们太昂贵了。
models.title_en: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
models.summary_en: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.
